parameters.query: SELECT l.id AS launch_id, l.user_id, l.launch_name, l.product_name, l.competitor_names, l.actual_launch_date, l.weeks_tracked, l.initial_messaging, l.initial_positioning, l.readiness_score FROM launch.launches l WHERE l.phase = 'post_launch' AND l.weeks_tracked < 4;

SELECT s.signal_type, s.company_name, s.title, s.summary FROM control_plane.signals s WHERE s.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND s.company_name = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $json.competitor_names ? $json.competitor_names.map(n => "'" + n.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') : "''" }}]) AND s.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT 30;

INSERT INTO launch.decay_reports (launch_id, report_date, week_number, messaging_drift_score, homepage_change_count, competitor_response_count, momentum_status, competitor_reactions, recommendations) VALUES ('{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid, CURRENT_DATE, {{ $json.week_number }}, {{ $json.messaging_drift }}, {{ $json.homepage_changes }}, {{ $json.competitor_responses }}, '{{ $json.momentum }}', '{{ $json.competitor_reactions_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.recommendations_json }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (launch_id, week_number) DO UPDATE SET messaging_drift_score = EXCLUDED.messaging_drift_score, homepage_change_count = EXCLUDED.homepage_change_count, competitor_response_count = EXCLUDED.competitor_response_count, momentum_status = EXCLUDED.momentum_status, competitor_reactions = EXCLUDED.competitor_reactions, recommendations = EXCLUDED.recommendations;

INSERT INTO launch.briefs (launch_id, brief_type, brief_date, title, content_json, content_md, signal_count, days_to_launch) VALUES ('{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid, 'decay', CURRENT_DATE, '{{ $json.brief_title }}', '{{ $json.brief_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.brief_md.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.signal_count }}, -{{ $json.days_since_launch }});

UPDATE launch.launches SET weeks_tracked = {{ $json.week_number }}, phase = CASE WHEN {{ $json.week_number }} >= 4 THEN 'retrospective' ELSE 'post_launch' END, updated_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid;
